message:
🐛 Lower banner z-index below navbar so dropdowns aren't blocked (#314)

Navbar and its dropdowns use z-50. Banners were also z-50, rendering
on top of dropdowns due to DOM order. Lowered to z-40/z-30/z-20 so
navbar dropdowns always appear above banners.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
